title: Add missing tests: browse, TOTP, agent adapters, notifications, terminal stream
acceptance_criteria: tests/web/browse.test.ts: path traversal attempts, directory creation, symlinks, edge cases
tests/web/totp.test.ts: setup, verify, disable endpoint integration tests
tests/web/agent-adapters/: unit tests with sample agent output for each adapter
tests/web/notifications.test.ts: settings read/write, test notification endpoint
tests/web/terminal-stream.test.ts: process crashes, cleanup failures, subscriber management
